overall.description: Game engine footage from a racing/exploration game set in Ibiza, featuring first-person navigation through sunlit Mediterranean streets. The player moves through an urban plaza, circles a parked van, and approaches a beachfront with palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with Mediterranean apartment buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sunlit plaza toward a white van visible in the distance

contemporary apartment block with orange accent panels and white concrete
unpaved dirt and gravel surface with patches of dry grass

segments.scene_description: Moving through a sunlit open plaza surrounded by Mediterranean apartment buildings. The ground is unpaved dirt with patches of grass. The camera approaches a white van visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street with olive tree and parked van

events.description: begins turning left to navigate around the parked white van blocking the path

agents.ego_description: navigating around the parked van by turning left and passing it on the left side

four-story residential building with yellow stucco and dark window frames

segments.scene_description: Approaching and navigating around a parked white van. A large olive tree stands near the van on the right. The camera turns left to circle the vehicle, revealing a yellow apartment building while the initial plaza buildings recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban residential street with mixed architecture

events.description: turns right at intersection to continue through residential streets

agents.ego_description: walking through residential streets and turning right at an intersection

entered.detail: low-rise concrete structure with metal roll-up doors
tall palm tree indicating coastal proximity

segments.scene_description: Moving through residential streets after passing the van. The architecture mixes concrete industrial buildings and residential apartments. The camera turns right at an intersection, and palm trees become visible in the distance indicating the approaching coastline.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal approach with palm trees and beach

events.description: urban street opens up to reveal beach and sea in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking toward the beach as the urban environment gives way to coastal scenery

notable_agents.action: silver sedan parked near the beach entrance

entered.detail: residential building with exterior staircases facing the beach
cluster of palm trees lining the path to the beach
sandy ground transitioning from dirt to beach
blue sea visible at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The street opens up to reveal a beachfront with palm trees lining the path. The ground transitions to sand, and the sea becomes visible in the distance. A silver sedan is parked near the beach entrance as the camera approaches the waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit inland plaza through residential streets toward a bright Mediterranean beachfront. It begins by traversing an unpaved dirt plaza surrounded by apartment buildings, moving steadily toward a white van parked in the distance. As the camera circles the vehicle and passes a large olive tree, the view shifts away from the initial plaza to reveal a yellow apartment building. The scene then transitions into a mix of industrial and residential streets, turning right at an intersection as palm trees emerge on the horizon. Finally, the street opens up and the ground turns to sand, passing a silver sedan as the camera reaches the waterfront and the sea comes into view.
